calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-13-2012 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-13-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jennifer McVeigh Roberts in Propria Persona. Joe McVeigh in Propria Persona.

The Court stated that it denied the ex parte petition because it did not see any urgency to liquidate the holdings. Mr. McVeigh stated that he was not familiar with what needs to be done in the Estate. The Court advised the Parties of the required filings/procedures and suggested that the Parties seek the assistance of an Attorney. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will (subject to review of the order). The Will is admitted and no bond is required. The Petition for Letters Testatmentary is moot and was taken off calendar.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Bui.

Petition For Letters Of Special Administration
Off Calendar Jun-01-2011 Denied
